docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIEU, HIEN XAI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. TINA LIEU IS SWORN AND ACTS AS THE CHEW CHOW INTERPRETER ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HO, CINDY SHUK AS TO DEFENDANT LIEU, HIEN XAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, CINDY SHUK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIEU, HIEN XAI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
